text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it someone's birthday today? Everyone
keeps yappin' about how they got a cake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What are you saying? Today is not just someone's birthday, it's your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Good grief, you've no need to beat around the
bush. We've already made all the preparations
necessary to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That said, it comes as no surprise that you didn't
notice. This past week, everything has been
proceeding in utmost secrecy...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, you played me like a damn fiddle. Who
woulda thunk you of all people would be folding
origami flowers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How do you know about that?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't get your socks untied. Instead, lemme
tell you the first word that ever came outta my
mouth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That won't be necessary. I am not curious in the
slightest, and I also still need to ask the Mejiro
chefs to bake some of their finest pizzas for
today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It was long ago, back when I started getting
bored of counting the legs on a Hallucigenia... I
boarded a vessel sailing west, and thus
proclaimed...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"You can never go wrong with cake or pizza, but
you know what would hit the spot right now?
Sukiyaki."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fine, then I shall instruct them to prepare that as
well!
